description: A research scientist needs to analyze the results from an in vivo preclinical study to determine the efficacy of a new compound.

nodes.task_description: Import the study data from the Electronic Lab Notebook (ELN).

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully imports the raw data, including dosage groups and biomarker measurements.

nodes.task_description: Perform statistical analysis to compare the treatment groups to the control group.

expected_outcome.value: Agent correctly performs a t-test or ANOVA and calculates p-values.
Agent creates a chart showing the relationship between drug dosage and efficacy.

nodes.task_description: Summarize the findings in a draft report.

expected_outcome.value: Agent generates a summary stating that the compound showed a statistically significant effect at a specific dose.
